name: The Back Nine Golf | Omaha, NE
about: The Back Nine Golf in Omaha, NE offers a golf simulator experience in an accessible format. The venue is designed to provide golfers with a convenient way to practice and play without traditional course constraints. While specific details about technology, pricing, and amenities are not available on the website, the focus appears to be on providing a practical golf simulation solution for various skill levels and group sizes.
why_golfers_like_it: Flexible booking options for individuals and groups
Supports various golfing activities from practice to events

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: It's recommended to bring your own clubs, though rental options may be available upon request.

faq.question: Can I bring outside food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted as the venue offers on-site food and beverage services.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically, 18 holes can be completed in 2-3 hours depending on simulator availability and group size.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue appears family-friendly, though specific children's amenities or age restrictions are not detailed on the website.
